svg.title: From Pain to Venture – Part 11 Reference Images
svg.desc: Reference images for Part 11: Venture System Map, Risk Register, and 90-Day Validation Plan.
svg.text: From Pain to Venture – Part 11 Reference Images
Seven components: Value Proposition · Key Activities · Key Resources ·
Key Partners · Team & Culture · Finance · Risk Register
A product is not a venture. A venture is a system.
Eight categories: Market · Product · Channel · Revenue · Delivery ·
Risk = trigger · likelihood · impact · early warning · owner · mitigation · decision rule
• Cash is the lifeblood of the venture
• Moat: not usually a wall on Day 1 — it is terrain carved over time
• Ethics / Legal / Data Risk: if data is a source of value, it is also a source of risk
• Kill Criteria: not to make quitting easy, but to stop self-deception
Startups need belief. But belief must be protected by systems and
constrained by evidence. Otherwise it becomes self-hypnosis.
